ab: Pa’ʉ, niroimi ku marivici siarisinatʉ, tʉni kara kasu ’apasuruvai ’ikua?
ch: W:Pa’ʉ，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Pa’ʉ, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ’akia ku kangvang. Paicʉ tamna sua isi.
tʉni kara ’apasuruvai ’ikua ’arivatʉ? tia makacang mai’i kasua.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, arao!
en: Sure, take it.

ab: sosomanpe! sosomanpe kisao Paicʉ.
en: Thank you and thank Paicʉ for me.

ab: neni tia araa musu?
en: May I help you?

ab: tia pa ku mai’i urucin sinatʉ isi.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, ’una pa kara?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: tia pa ku sumasuruvai uturu sinatʉ isi.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: tʉni cu! atʉnʉngʉa maca’ivi turu taniara tia mai’i.
ch: w:好了！記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: ’una pa kara kasu sia’ucu’ucu?
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ai’iʉn cu maku miʉra.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: miseni niara’akia sia’ucu’ucu maku?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: nguai kara nipasuruvai musu na Pa’ʉ?
en: Did you lend it to Pa’ʉ?

ab: tokia’e! tanamʉʉn maku kesoni.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: sia’ucu’ucu maku, ’apasuruvaiʉn pa kasua.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Paicʉ, pananapa isi, Pa’ʉ kara ’apasuruvai kasua?
en: Paicʉ, did Pa’ʉ lend you this coat?

ab: ka’anʉ, isi ia cina maku nipu’a movua ’ikua.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Pa’ʉ tamna pananapa matʉa mataa kasua.
en: Pa’ʉ’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: ta’ʉrʉm sua nguain tamna pananapa. ka’aʉ matʉa tapasʉ mia.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的。我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Paicʉ, siniruvai kara kasu na Pa’ʉ vantuku?
en: Paicʉ, did you borrow money from Pa’ʉ?

ab: ’aveni, natia ku soni mai’i ’inia, niroimi ku marivici vantuku.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: makasuin tia nukanmana kasu mai’i?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: tia ku mai’i ’inia nura.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ʉʉ’ʉ, muranʉ ku kasua tumatuturu Pa’ʉ.
en: Okay, I will tell Pa’ʉ for you.
